hypothesis: Incorporating explicit heating energy (from temperature‑dependent heat capacities and reaction enthalpies) and purification costs (from ML‑predicted solubility/volatility of byproducts) into the workflow’s economic efficiency metric will invert the current Ca2SiO4 recipe ranking such that, at synthesis temperatures ≥1300°C and median 2025 market prices, Ca3SiO5+SiO2 yields at least 20% more grams per euro than CaO+SiO2.
